page_content: ENCE412 Environmental Engineering Unit Operations (3 Credits) Examination of unit operations and processes encountered in environmental engineering ﬁeld. Fundamental principles learned from previous classes will be applied into the design and operation of unit operations and processes, particularly in the area of water and wastewater treatment. Similar processes will be applied to air pollution control, solid waste disposal and hazardous waste treatment. Prerequisite: ENCE305 and ENCE310; and permission of ENGR-Civil & Environmental Engineering department.
